options.name: --auth
options.description:
Use browser token authentication for the
dashboard

options.name: --auto-update
options.description:
Automatically update the dashboard to the latest
version

options.name: --browser
options.description: Launch the dashboard in the default browser

options.name: --cors-headers
options.description:
The allowed headers for CORS requests, separated by a
comma

options.name: --cors-origins
options.description:
The allowed origins for CORS requests, separated by a
comma. A wildcard (*) can be used to allow any domain

options.name: --dashboard-https
options.description:
Use HTTPS instead of HTTP for the dashboard, overrides the
global HTTPS option

options.name: --hostname
options.description:
The hostname used for the dashboard and OTLP
server

options.name: --https
options.description:
Use HTTPS instead of HTTP, this applies to both the
dashboard and the OTLP server

options.name: --multiple
options.description:
Allow running multiple instances of the dashboard, if not
passed, existing instances will be replaced

options.name: --otlp-http-port
options.description:
The port the OTLP/HTTP server will listen on, by default,
only the gRPC server is started

options.name: --otlp-https
options.description:
Use HTTPS instead of HTTP for the OTLP/gRPC and OTLP/HTTP
endpoints, overrides the global HTTPS option

options.name: --otlp-key
options.description: The API key to use for the OTLP server

options.name: --otlp-port
options.description:
The port the OTLP/gRPC server will listen on, can be
disabled by passing 0

options.name: --port
options.description: The port the dashboard will be available on

options.name: --token
options.description:
The token to use for dashboard authentication, if not
passed, the token will be randomly generated by the dashboard

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose logging

arguments.name: version
arguments.description: The version of the dashboard to run

options.name: --allow-prerelease
options.description: Allow prerelease versions when installing

arguments.name: version
arguments.description:
The version of the dashboard to install, pass 'latest' to 
install the latest version available

arguments.name: version
arguments.description:
The version of the dashboard to uninstall, pass 'all' or 
'*' to uninstall all versions

commands.name: cleanup
commands.description:
Remove old versions of the dashboard and other temporary 
files
